name: RWBY AU RPG
description:
In this Alternate Universe, there are some slight changes that would appear different from the main Universe.

Salem is the headmaster of Beacon, and Ozpin is the dark wizard. Weiss is general of Atlas, Yang is genderswap to a male. Blake is the leader of the White Fang after Adam's death. Ruby wears a white dress similar to Weiss's Volume 1 dress but with red added to it.

Team JNPR have gotten genderswaps as well as team CFVY. Cinder has gotten genderswap to a male. Emerald is the Maiden instead. Neo is a cat faunus, but you get the picture.
creator: Blank_22
